description: Prepare a 3D printable asset of the Suzanne monkey head on a cylindrical base. Configure the scene units to Metric (Millimeters). The Suzanne mesh should have a height of 60mm, and the cylindrical base should have a diameter of 40mm and a height of 5mm. Position Suzanne on top of the base and combine them into a single mesh. Export the final model as an STL file to /home/ga/BlenderProjects/suzanne_print.stl with a scale where 1 unit equals 1 millimeter.
